zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Deincourt於1353年出生在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼時，她的父親William Deincourt II27歲，母親Margaret de Welles27歲。她於1386年與Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme在英國諾圖波藍德賀普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1408年11月在英國林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Deincourt于1353年出生在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼时，她的父亲William Deincourt II27岁，母亲Margaret de Welles27岁。她于1386年与Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme在英国諾圖波藍德賀普爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1408年11月在英国林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Deincourt was born in 1353, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, her father, William Deincourt II, was 27 and her mother, Margaret de Welles, was 27. She married Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme in 1386, in Hepple, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in November 1408, in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Deincourt est née en 1353, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William Deincourt II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Welles, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme en 1386, à Hepple, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1408, à Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Deincourt 1353 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Deincourt II 27 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Welles 27. Sie hat 1386 in Hepple, Northumberland, England Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im November 1408 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Deincourt è nata il nel 1353 nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, William Deincourt II, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Welles, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme nel 1386, nel Hepple, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1408, nel Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Deincourtが1353年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで生まれた時，父William Deincourt IIは27歳，母Margaret de Wellesは27歳であった。1386年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヘップルでSir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kymeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1408年11月にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタリングボロウで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタリングボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Deincourt(이)가 1353년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Deincourt II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Welles(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1386년 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤프플에서 Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 11월 영국 링코실르 스탤링버루에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스탤링버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Deincourt nasceu em 1353, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Deincourt II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Welles, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme em 1386, em Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1408, em Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Deincourt родилась в 1353 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Deincourt II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Welles, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme в 1386 г. в местности хеппл, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла ноябрь 1408 г. в местности сталлингбороую, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности сталлингбороую, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Deincourt nació en 1353, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Deincourt II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret de Welles, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme en 1386, en Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1408, en Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
